name: Parcel Perform Post-Purchase Delivery Experience API
what_it_does: Parcel Perform logistics data and delivery experience platform REST API for multi-carrier shipment tracking, delivery prediction, and post-purchase customer communication. Enables AI agents to manage multi-carrier shipment tracking and status normalization for unified post-purchase visibility automation, handle delivery prediction and ETA calculation using ML models for proactive customer notification automation, access carrier performance analytics and SLA compliance reporting for logistics KPI monitoring, retrieve exception detection and delivery failure alerting for proactive customer service automation, manage branded tracking page and notification template delivery for customer-facing delivery experience automation, handle returns tracking and reverse logistics status for return experience automation, access carrier data benchmarking for carrier selection optimization, retrieve checkpoint event normalization across 1,000+ carriers for unified logistics data automation, manage webhook delivery for shipment status change events for real-time downstream integration, and integrate Parcel Perform with Salesforce, Zendesk, Shopify, and enterprise OMS for end-to-end post-purchase lifecycle management.
use_cases: Tracking shipments from post-purchase CX agents
Predicting delivery dates from ETA automation agents
Detecting delivery exceptions from CS escalation agents
Benchmarking carriers from logistics analytics agents
not_for: Route planning and last-mile dispatch optimization
best_when: An e-commerce retailer, marketplace, or logistics operator wanting AI agents to automate post-purchase delivery visibility, proactive exception management, carrier performance analytics, and branded customer communication across multi-carrier shipments.
avoid_when: CARRIER DATA FRESHNESS AND CHECKPOINT LAG: Parcel Perform carrier checkpoint data depends on carrier API and EDI feed freshness; some carriers have hours-long data refresh delays; automated customer delivery notifications based on Parcel Perform data may be stale relative to actual carrier system; implement carrier data freshness metadata before time-sensitive customer communications. DELIVERY PREDICTION ACCURACY FOR CUSTOMER COMMITMENTS: Parcel Perform ML delivery predictions have confidence intervals; automated customer delivery date commitments based on ETA API without confidence interval consideration create customer promise failures when predictions miss; surface prediction confidence alongside ETA for agent decision-making. GDPR SHIPMENT DATA FOR EU RECIPIENT ADDRESSES: Automated processing of shipment data containing EU recipient PII (name, address) in Parcel Perform requires GDPR data processing agreement; automated shipment data retention and analytics on EU recipient data without lawful basis creates GDPR exposure.

auth.notes: Parcel Perform uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ with offices in Germany, Vietnam, Australia. Founded 2017 by Arne Jeroschewski and Andrei Sement. Private ($112M raised, Bessemer Venture Partners, GIC Singapore, Insight Partners). 1,000+ carrier integrations. Covers 800M+ tracking events. Enterprise e-commerce and logistics focus. Competes with AfterShip, Narvar, and Route for post-purchase delivery experience.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription by tracked shipment volume
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by tracked shipment volume; carrier analytics, delivery experience, and data API modules; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Singapore HQ. Private ($112M raised). Founded 2017. 1,000+ carrier integrations. Enterprise annual subscription by shipment volume. Bessemer, GIC, Insight investors.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bulk shipment ingestion and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for checkpoint events

known_agent_gotchas: CARRIER DATA FRESHNESS METADATA REQUIRED FOR NOTIFICATIONS: Parcel Perform checkpoint data has carrier-dependent refresh intervals ranging from near-real-time to 4-6 hours; automated proactive customer notifications must check checkpoint data timestamp before sending; stale checkpoint-based notifications create incorrect customer delivery expectations

ML ETA CONFIDENCE INTERVAL FOR CUSTOMER COMMITMENTS: Parcel Perform delivery ETA predictions include confidence intervals; automated customer delivery date commitment based on point ETA estimate without confidence interval creates promise failure rate proportional to prediction uncertainty; surface low-confidence ETAs for human review before customer commitment

EXCEPTION CLASSIFICATION CONSISTENCY ACROSS CARRIERS: Parcel Perform normalizes carrier exception codes to standard exception taxonomy (delivery failed, address issue, customs hold, etc.); automated exception response workflows built on normalized exception codes must validate carrier-specific exception detail for accurate customer communication; generic exception responses for specific carrier issues reduce CS resolution effectiveness

Webhook idempotency for shipment status events — Parcel Perform webhooks may deliver duplicate events on carrier data refresh; automated downstream actions (CS ticket creation, customer notification) triggered by shipment webhooks must implement idempotency by tracking processed checkpoint IDs

Bulk shipment tracking ingestion rate limits — automated bulk shipment registration via Parcel Perform API for high-volume merchants (100K+ shipments/day) triggers ingestion rate limiting; implement batched shipment registration with exponential backoff; monitor ingestion queue depth for large volume periods (peak season)

GDPR data residency for EU recipient shipment data — Parcel Perform offers EU data residency for GDPR compliance; automated shipment tracking for EU recipient addresses must be configured on EU data residency instance; mixed US/EU instance configuration creates GDPR cross-border transfer exposure for EU recipient PII
agent_readiness.security_notes: Logistics data platform. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key/OAuth. US/EU/SG/AU. Shipment tracking and recipient address data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Post-purchase logistics. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key/OAuth. Global. Shipment and recipient PII data.
